zh.Lavenham, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可拉文哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Spring於1500年出生在英國素福爾可拉文哈姆時，他的父親Thomas Spring44歲，母親Anne King31歲。他於1527年與Dorothy Waldegrave在英國素福爾可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1547年8月12日在英國素福爾可享年47歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可希哈姆。

zh-hans.Lavenham, Suffolk, England: 英国素福爾可拉文哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Spring于1500年出生在英国素福爾可拉文哈姆时，他的父亲Thomas Spring44岁，母亲Anne King31岁。他于1527年与Dorothy Waldegrave在英国素福爾可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1547年8月12日在英国素福爾可享年47岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可希哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Spring
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname for a young man, from Middle English, Old English spring ‘young growth’. The word is first recorded in the 16th century, but is quite likely much older. Compare Springett .
English: topographic name from Middle English, Old English spring, used for someone who lived by a plantation of young trees or (less often) a spring of water.

German and Danish: from Middle High German sprinc, Middle Low German sprink ‘spring, well’, hence a topographic name for someone who lived by a spring or well, or a habitational name from Springe near Hanover.

variants.name: Sprung
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Achim, Gerhard.
German: from Middle High German sprunc ‘spring’, a topographic name for someone who lived by a spring or well (see also Spring 3, Sprang ).

variants.name: Springett
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived by a plantation of young trees, a copse, from an unrecorded Middle English, Old English springet. Compare Spring .
perhaps a nickname from an unrecorded Middle English diminutive of   Spring  , ‘young man’.

variants.name: Springs
meanings: English (Norfolk): variant of Spring with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Spring was born in 1500, in Lavenham, Suffolk, England, his father, Thomas Spring, was 44 and his mother, Anne King, was 31. He married Dorothy Waldegrave in 1527, in Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 12 August 1547, in Suffolk, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in Hitcham, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Spring est né en 1500, à Lavenham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Spring, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Anne King, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Dorothy Waldegrave en 1527, à Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 12 août 1547, à Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Hitcham, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Spring 1500 in Lavenham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Spring 44 und seine Mutter Anne King 31. Er hat 1527 in Suffolk, England Dorothy Waldegrave geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 12. August 1547 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Suffolk, England und wurde in Hitcham, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Spring è nato il nel 1500 nel Lavenham, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Thomas Spring, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Anne King, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Dorothy Waldegrave nel 1527, nel Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 12 agosto 1547, nel Suffolk, England, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Hitcham, Suffolk, England.

ja.Lavenham, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクラベンハム
ja.Hitcham, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクヒトチャム
ja.lifeSummary: John Springが1500年にイギリススフォルクラベンハムで生まれた時，父Thomas Springは44歳，母Anne Kingは31歳であった。1527年にイギリススフォルクでDorothy Waldegraveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1547年8月12日にイギリススフォルクで47歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクヒトチャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Spring(이)가 1500년 영국 수폴크 레이븐함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Spring(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne King(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1527년 영국 수폴크에서 Dorothy Waldegrave(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1547년 8월 12일 영국 수폴크에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 히트챔에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Spring nasceu em 1500, em Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Spring, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Anne King, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Dorothy Waldegrave em 1527, em Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de agosto de 1547, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Hitcham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Spring родился в 1500 г. в местности лавенам, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Spring было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Anne King, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Dorothy Waldegrave в 1527 г. в местности суффолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 12 августа 1547 г. в местности суффолк, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности хичам, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Spring nació en 1500, en Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Spring, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Anne King, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Dorothy Waldegrave en 1527, en Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 12 de agosto de 1547, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Hitcham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
